title: Siu, l'influencer ferita è stabile. Il marito in attesa dell'interrogatorio
en_title: Siu, the wounded influencer is stable. The husband waiting for the interrogation
en_content:
AGI - Jonathan Maldonato, the husband of Soukaina El Basri, the thirty-year-old influencer in pharmacological comaspella   Le prison doors opened for him in the night after a long stay, almost four hours, in the offices of the Questura. To the man, who already in the interview on Saturday before the Pm was assisted by lawyer Giovanna Barbotto, last night the order of custody in prison would be notified.

Siu is stable Meanwhile, the conditions of "Siu" remain in the intensive care department of the Hospital of Novara. Director-General Gianfranco Zulian, speaking with Agi, maintains the rebuke on the evolution of the health of the young woman, and forgets the news that yesterday afternoon, in the department's waiting room, there would have been a confrontation between the husband and the woman's brother.

The possible motive It takes more and more shape in the meantime the picture within which the dramatic episode has matured. A context of "problematic" reports as Prosecutor Teresa Angela Camelio explained, and that already in February would have resulted in a complaint for mistreatment submitted by Siu against her husband. Tension mover would be jealousy, which would gradually poison the relationship.

Family groups The relationship between her family and Jonathan's family is very thesis: Last night the mother of man reached him in the police station, perhaps to give him personal effects. The mother of him would also be entrusted with the two girls of 5 and 6 years, daughters of the couple. At this moment they would find themselves in the house of grandparents in a small town in the Valley of Mosso. Questions about Jonathan

After telling that the wound to the chest of his wife would be provoked "from the corner of a mobile on which the same would have slipped", Jonathan Maldonato, already denounced by his wife for mistreatment in May 2023, with a complaint then remitted, tried to poison the thesis of the autolesionistic gesture. Biella's attorney confirmed it.   "In the night of May 16 - the Procura explains in a note - a first inspection was performed at the residence of the couple from the pm in turn with the Mobile Team and the Scientific Police of Biella". The property was placed under seizure and the spouse of the 30-year-old enrolled in the register of the investigations. Asked, the man would have reiterated that the woman "would be provoked independently the chest wound" indicating the alleged weapon with which El Basri would have hit.   A version that did not convince the magistrates, "even in relation to the type of weapon indicated by Maldonato". The prosecutor also confirmed that the man's arrest was decided "considered the probate gravity acquired and detected the concreteization of a danger of escape". "I am in progress - the note concludes - further investigations by the investigators."

title: Goccia fredda nel weekend, poi arriva l'alta pressione
content:
AGI- Un flusso di correnti umide collegato ad un'area depressionaria centrata sulle Isole Britanniche investe ancora l'Italia settentrionale. Condizioni meteo instabili tra oggi e domani sulle regioni del Nord Italia con nuvolosità in transito associata a piogge e temporali sparsi. Tempo più asciutto invece al Centro-Sud con ampi spazi di sereno e solo isolati fenomeni pomeridiani sui settori interni.   Generale peggioramento invece tra Sabato e Domenica quando il transito di una goccia fredda rinnoverà condizioni di instabilità un po' su tutta la Penisola. Gli ultimi aggiornamenti del Centro Meteo Italiano, per la prossima settimana mostrano un'espansione dell'alta pressione anche se restando l'Italia sul bordo orientale potrebbe ancora avere a che fare con una spiccata instabilità pomeridiana. Temperature in media o localmente poco al di sotto fino al termine di maggio.

Ecco in dettaglio le previsioni per oggi:

- Al Nord:

Al mattino nuvolosita' compatta con precipitazioni sparse tra Liguria, Piemonte, Lombardia e Trentino, variabile altrove. Al pomeriggio attese ancora piogge diffuse ma senza fenomeni di rilievo associati. In serata ancora possibile qualche piovasco, migliora nella notte.

- Al Centro:

Al mattino cieli in prevalenza soleggiati. Al pomeriggio possibili isolati piovaschi tra Toscana ed Umbria, tempo invariato altrove. In serata si rinnovano condizioni di tempo stabile con assenza prevalente di nuvolosita'; nessuna variazione nella notte.

- Al Sud e Sulle Isole:

Cieli soleggiati sia al mattino che al pomeriggio su tutti i settori. In serata ancora condizioni di tempo asciutto con cieli sereni ovunque. Temperature minime stabili o in rialzo al nord e sulla Sicilia, in lieve calo altrove; massime in generale aumento.

E poi le previsioni per domani:

- Al Nord:

Al mattino locali piovaschi tra Lombardia e Triveneto, variabilita' asciutta altrove. Al pomeriggio instabilita' in aumento con acquazzoni e temporali sparsi, piu' asciutto tra Romagna, pianure venete e coste del Friuli. In serata tempo in miglioramento ma con residui fenomeni specie al Nord-Ovest.

- Al Centro:

Al mattino tempo stabile con cieli sereni o poco nuvolosi. Al pomeriggio non sono attese variazioni di rilievo con temporali e cieli soleggiati, maggiori addensamenti nelle zone interne. In serata si rinnovano condizioni di tempo stabile con prevalenza di cieli sereni o poco nuvolosi.

- Al Sud e Sulle Isole:

Al mattino molte nubi sulla Sardegna ma con tempo asciutto, sole prevalente sulle altre regioni. Al pomeriggio poche variazioni con nuvolosita' alternata a schiarite, locali piogge sulla Sardegna. In serata piogge sparse in arrivo sulla Sardegna, asciutto altrove con nuvolosita' in aumento. Temperature minime stabili o in lieve calo sulle regioni peninsulari e in rialzo sulle Isole Maggiori, massime in generale aumento su tutta l'Italia.
en_title: Cold drop on the weekend, then the high pressure arrives
en_content:
AGI- A flow of wet currents connected to a depression area centered on the British Islands still invests northern Italy. Instable weather conditions between today and tomorrow on the regions of Northern Italy with clouds in transit associated with rains and storms scattered. Dryer time instead at the Centro-Sud with large spaces of serene and only isolated afternoon phenomena on the internal sectors.   General worsening instead between Saturday and Sunday when the transit of a cold drop will renew conditions of instability a little on the whole Peninsula. The latest updates of the Italian Meteo Centre, for the next week show an expansion of high pressure even if remaining Italy on the eastern edge could still have to deal with a marked afternoon instability. Temperatures on average or locally slightly below until the end of May.

Here is the forecast for today:

- North In the morning cloudy, compact with rainfall scattered between Liguria, Piedmont, Lombardy and Trentino, variable elsewhere. In the afternoon he waited for widespread rainfall but without associated phenomena of relief. In the evening still possible some rain, improves in the night.

- To the Centre: In the morning skies in sunny prevalence. In the afternoon possible rainy blocks between Tuscany and Umbria, time unchanged elsewhere. In the evening stable conditions are renewed with prevailing absence of cloud; no variation in the night.

- South and Islands Sunny skies both in the morning and in the afternoon on all sectors. In the evening still dry weather conditions with clear skies everywhere. Minimum temperatures stable or rising to the north and Sicily, slightly falling elsewhere; maximum in general increase.

And then the forecast for tomorrow:

- North In the morning local rainy between Lombardy and Triveneto, variable dry elsewhere. In the afternoon, rising with showers and thunderstorms, dryer between Romagna, Veneto plains and coasts of Friuli. In the evening time improving but with residual phenomena especially in the North-West.

- To the Centre: In the morning stable time with serene or little cloudy skies. In the afternoon no significant changes are expected with thunderstorms and sunny skies, greater compensation in the interior areas. In the evening we renew stable conditions with prevalence of serene or unmarried skies.

- South and Islands In the morning many clouds on Sardinia but with dry weather, sun prevailing on the other regions. In the afternoon few variations with alternating cloudyness, local rains on Sardinia. In the evening rains spread in arrival on Sardinia, dry elsewhere with cloudy rising. Minimum temperatures stable or in a slight decrease on the peninsular regions and rising on the Major Islands, maximum in general increase throughout Italy.
